title: Budget to include additional salary
doc_html:
§422.  Budget to include additional salary

The governing authority of the parish of East Baton Rouge shall annually, and at the same time it prepares its general budget of expenses, budget an amount sufficient to pay the salary fixed in R.S. 16:421.
doc_text:
§422.  Budget to include additional salary
The governing authority of the parish of East Baton Rouge shall annually, and at the same time it prepares its general budget of expenses, budget an amount sufficient to pay the salary fixed in R.S. 16:421.
